datasets.name: equipment_status
datasets.query: SELECT e.equipment_id, e.equipment_name, e.line, e.criticality, e.operating_hours, ROUND(AVG(s.vibration_rms), 2) as avg_vibration, ROUND(MAX(s.vibration_rms), 2) as max_vibration, ROUND(AVG(s.temperature_c), 1) as avg_temperature, ROUND(MAX(s.temperature_c), 1) as max_temperature, ROUND(AVG(s.pressure_bar), 1) as avg_pressure, ROUND(AVG(s.current_amp), 2) as avg_current, CASE WHEN AVG(s.vibration_rms) > 10.0 OR AVG(s.temperature_c) > 90.0 THEN '긴급' WHEN AVG(s.vibration_rms) > 7.0 OR AVG(s.temperature_c) > 75.0 THEN '위험' WHEN AVG(s.vibration_rms) > 4.5 OR AVG(s.temperature_c) > 60.0 THEN '주의' ELSE '정상' END AS status, COUNT(*) as reading_count FROM ebay_anomaly_detection_catalog.predictive_maintenance.equipment_master e JOIN ebay_anomaly_detection_catalog.predictive_maintenance.sensor_readings s ON e.equipment_id = s.equipment_id GROUP BY ALL ORDER BY avg_vibration DESC

datasets.name: kpi_total
datasets.query: SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT equipment_id) as total_equipment FROM ebay_anomaly_detection_catalog.predictive_maintenance.equipment_master

datasets.name: kpi_critical
datasets.query: SELECT COUNT(*) as critical_count FROM (SELECT e.equipment_id FROM ebay_anomaly_detection_catalog.predictive_maintenance.equipment_master e JOIN ebay_anomaly_detection_catalog.predictive_maintenance.sensor_readings s ON e.equipment_id = s.equipment_id GROUP BY e.equipment_id HAVING AVG(s.vibration_rms) > 7.0 OR AVG(s.temperature_c) > 75.0)

datasets.name: status_counts
datasets.query: WITH eq_status AS (SELECT e.equipment_id, CASE WHEN AVG(s.vibration_rms) > 10.0 OR AVG(s.temperature_c) > 90.0 THEN '긴급' WHEN AVG(s.vibration_rms) > 7.0 OR AVG(s.temperature_c) > 75.0 THEN '위험' WHEN AVG(s.vibration_rms) > 4.5 OR AVG(s.temperature_c) > 60.0 THEN '주의' ELSE '정상' END AS status FROM ebay_anomaly_detection_catalog.predictive_maintenance.equipment_master e JOIN ebay_anomaly_detection_catalog.predictive_maintenance.sensor_readings s ON e.equipment_id = s.equipment_id GROUP BY e.equipment_id) SELECT status, COUNT(*) as count FROM eq_status GROUP BY status ORDER BY CASE status WHEN '긴급' THEN 1 WHEN '위험' THEN 2 WHEN '주의' THEN 3 ELSE 4 END

datasets.name: vibration_by_equipment
datasets.query: SELECT e.equipment_id, e.equipment_name, ROUND(AVG(s.vibration_rms), 2) as avg_vibration FROM ebay_anomaly_detection_catalog.predictive_maintenance.equipment_master e JOIN ebay_anomaly_detection_catalog.predictive_maintenance.sensor_readings s ON e.equipment_id = s.equipment_id GROUP BY e.equipment_id, e.equipment_name ORDER BY avg_vibration DESC

datasets.name: temp_by_equipment
datasets.query: SELECT e.equipment_id, e.equipment_name, ROUND(AVG(s.temperature_c), 1) as avg_temperature FROM ebay_anomaly_detection_catalog.predictive_maintenance.equipment_master e JOIN ebay_anomaly_detection_catalog.predictive_maintenance.sensor_readings s ON e.equipment_id = s.equipment_id GROUP BY e.equipment_id, e.equipment_name ORDER BY avg_temperature DESC

datasets.name: vibration_trend
datasets.query: SELECT equipment_id, DATE(timestamp) as date, ROUND(AVG(vibration_rms), 2) as avg_vibration FROM ebay_anomaly_detection_catalog.predictive_maintenance.sensor_readings GROUP BY equipment_id, DATE(timestamp) ORDER BY date

datasets.name: temp_trend
datasets.query: SELECT equipment_id, DATE(timestamp) as date, ROUND(AVG(temperature_c), 1) as avg_temperature FROM ebay_anomaly_detection_catalog.predictive_maintenance.sensor_readings GROUP BY equipment_id, DATE(timestamp) ORDER BY date

datasets.name: vibration_vs_temp
datasets.query: SELECT e.equipment_id, e.equipment_name, ROUND(AVG(s.vibration_rms), 2) as avg_vibration, ROUND(AVG(s.temperature_c), 1) as avg_temperature, e.criticality FROM ebay_anomaly_detection_catalog.predictive_maintenance.equipment_master e JOIN ebay_anomaly_detection_catalog.predictive_maintenance.sensor_readings s ON e.equipment_id = s.equipment_id GROUP BY ALL

datasets.name: anomaly_hourly
datasets.query: SELECT HOUR(timestamp) as hour_of_day, COUNT(*) as anomaly_count FROM ebay_anomaly_detection_catalog.predictive_maintenance.sensor_readings WHERE vibration_rms > 7.0 OR temperature_c > 75.0 GROUP BY HOUR(timestamp) ORDER BY hour_of_day

datasets.name: criticality_stats
datasets.query: SELECT e.criticality, ROUND(AVG(s.vibration_rms), 2) as avg_vibration, ROUND(AVG(s.temperature_c), 1) as avg_temperature, ROUND(AVG(s.pressure_bar), 1) as avg_pressure, COUNT(DISTINCT e.equipment_id) as equipment_count FROM ebay_anomaly_detection_catalog.predictive_maintenance.equipment_master e JOIN ebay_anomaly_detection_catalog.predictive_maintenance.sensor_readings s ON e.equipment_id = s.equipment_id GROUP BY e.criticality ORDER BY CASE e.criticality WHEN '핵심' THEN 1 WHEN '중요' THEN 2 ELSE 3 END

datasets.name: line_stats
datasets.query: SELECT e.line as production_line, COUNT(DISTINCT e.equipment_id) as equipment_count, ROUND(AVG(s.vibration_rms), 2) as avg_vibration, ROUND(AVG(s.temperature_c), 1) as avg_temperature FROM ebay_anomaly_detection_catalog.predictive_maintenance.equipment_master e JOIN ebay_anomaly_detection_catalog.predictive_maintenance.sensor_readings s ON e.equipment_id = s.equipment_id GROUP BY e.line ORDER BY avg_vibration DESC
